new-project.description: Create a new Lore Forge project skeleton and first interview queue.
new-project.prompt: Create a new Lore Forge project. Use the project-creator agent workflow. Ask for missing required inputs first if the project name, genre, theme, platform, or target length are absent. Create the project under projects/active/<project-name>/ and generate interview_next.md.

continue-project.description: Continue developing an existing Lore Forge project through interview and Story Bible updates.
continue-project.prompt: Continue an existing Lore Forge project. Identify the active project if not specified, read its project.md and Story Bible files, then use the story-interviewer workflow to find the highest-impact missing information. Ask no more than three questions.

audit.description: Run a Lore Forge consistency review on a project or artifact.
audit.prompt: Audit the requested Lore Forge project or artifact. Use the lore-auditor workflow. Prioritize contradictions, timeline breaks, character knowledge leaks, terminology drift, and unresolved canon conflicts. Report findings by severity with file references.
